title: Dry Bulk Shipping - August 11, 2018
summary: Capesize rates remain in range - After briefly spiking to ~27,000/d, Capesize rates returned in their most Atlantic Capesize cargo flow at multi-year highs - The 4-week trailing average of Atlantic Capesize fixtures We expect rates to strengthen from here - A short breather following the recent strength in fixtures might 1H trade Chinese volumes only slightly higher - Year-to-date, China import volumes for the big 3 dry bulk Fleet growth for the year should now exceed 2% - Year-to-date growth in the global dry bulk fleet is now Short term outlook cautious - We turn cautious in the near term as both fundamentals (cargo flow vs. Long term outlook neutral - We continue to see positive fundamentals for the year ahead with both
